entries.definition:
one who is caused to lose consciousness (47:20) يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَيْكَ نَظَرَ
الْمَغْشِيِّ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْمَوْتِ looking at you [Prophet] with the look of one
fainting because of [the approach of] the throes of death.
entries.definition_english:
one who is caused to lose consciousness (47:20) يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَيْكَ نَظَرَ
الْمَغْشِيِّ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْمَوْتِ looking at you [Prophet] with the look of one
fainting because of [the approach of] the throes of death.

entries.definition:
gh–ṣ–b to extort, to take by force, to rape, to scrape hair off
the skin by sheer force. Of this root, only غَصْبًا ghaṣban occurs
once in the Qur’an.

غَصْب ghaṣb [v. n. adverbially used] by extortion, by force
(18:79) وَكَانَ وَرَاءَهُمْ مَلِكٌ يَأْخُذُ كُلَّ سَفِينَةٍ غَصْبًا behind them was a king
who was seizing every [serviceable] boat by force.
entries.definition_english:
gh–ṣ–b to extort, to take by force, to rape, to scrape hair off
the skin by sheer force. Of this root, only غَصْبًا ghaṣban occurs
once in the Qur’an.

غَصْب ghaṣb [v. n. adverbially used] by extortion, by force
(18:79) وَكَانَ وَرَاءَهُمْ مَلِكٌ يَأْخُذُ كُلَّ سَفِينَةٍ غَصْبًا behind them was a king
who was seizing every [serviceable] boat by force.
